name: LLM Security Planning Knowledge Dataset
purpose: Normalized reasoning knowledge for AI-driven LLM security planning.

entity_directories.strategies: Abstract execution approaches for authorized testing.
entity_directories.prompt_mutations: Safe mutation concepts used by prompt mutation engines.
entity_directories.conversation_styles: Interaction patterns such as single-turn or multi-turn.
entity_directories.model_profiles: Model and deployment traits relevant to risk planning.
entity_directories.mitigations: Controls and recommendations linked to risks.
